title: Login Interface Publicly Reachable
description: The subdomain 'account.deloitte.com' exposes a login or authentication page to the internet. Public login surfaces are direct targets for brute-force and credential-stuffing attacks, especially if rate-limiting or MFA is not enforced.
action: Enable MFA on all accounts accessible via this login page. Implement rate-limiting and account lockout policies. Ensure the underlying system is patched to the latest version.

title: Sensitive File Exposed — .aws/credentials
description: The file '/.aws/credentials' (AWS credentials file) is publicly accessible at https://deloitteconnect.deloitte.com/.aws/credentials.
action: Remove or restrict access to this file immediately. Ensure your web server does not serve sensitive files (add deny rules for these paths). Audit your deployment pipeline to prevent future leaks.
